ab: aunini u musa tahluavʉ?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: mualikihli aku musa tahluavʉ.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: aunini kana’ana musa parana maisasavusavuanʉna?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: muasasala kana’ana musa parana maisasavusavuanʉna.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: aunini a u musa Pʉngʉhu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: mutatungusa aku miapipihlihli saliana musa Pʉngʉhu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: aunini a u musa Pʉngʉhu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: mutatungusa aku ’avangʉna musa Pʉngʉhu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: ngasa atatungusa u puaili salia?
en: How do you go home?

ab: mutatungusa aku likihli muamasahli puaili salia.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: ngasa mutatungusa ’Uusuna musa ariatʉkʉrana?
en: How does ’Uusuna go to school?

ab: mutatungusu ’Uusuna likihli apuhlu musa ariatʉkʉrana.
en: ’Uusuna goes to school by train.

ab: ngasa mutatungusu Paulina musa tapakia?
en: How does Paulina go to church?

ab: mulikihli umaruamia sapahlʉ Paulina musa tapakia.
en: Piacʉ goes to church by bicycle.

ab: mutatungusu u i likihli muamasahli musa ariatʉkʉrana?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ku, mutatungusu aku likihli kikucu musa ariatʉkʉrana.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: mulikihli umaruamia sapahli u i musa ariatʉkʉrana?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: a’ʉ, mulikihli umaruamia sapahlʉna aku musa ariatʉkʉrana.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: mutatungusa u i likihli hluvu’u musa Takau?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: a’ʉ, mutatungusa aku likihli hluvu’u musa Takau.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: mutatungusa u likihli apuhlu ahla mutatungusu miapihlihli salia musa Taitu?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: mutatungusa aku salia miapihlihli, mutatungusa salia miapihlihli mataingalʉ maliahlʉ likihli apuhlu.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: musa tapakia mutatungusu a u likihli kikucu ahla mualikihli?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: mualikihli aku musa tapakia, mualikihli mataingalʉ talakiahlʉ mutatungusa likihli kikucu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: masahli i i’a’ana tarʉtatʉkʉhlʉ pahlivinga aatʉ salia mu?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: kuasahli, riani ku mulikihli umaru ’urai musa i’a’ana tarʉtatʉkʉhlʉ pahlivinga.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: masahli i aihlana aatʉ ariatʉkʉranana?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: tam masahli, miungu maci musasala.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: masahli i tai’a’ana aatʉ parana utatungusa likihli?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: kipuhlu utatungusa likihli, musasala mʉlʉngʉsʉ takʉmʉnʉ ulima utuatapusana miungu cu.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
